Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1436

Title: Extends provisions of law relating to temporary investments by local governments
Summary: Extends provisions of law relating to temporary investments by local governments.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 130 of the laws of 1998, amending the general municipal law relating to temporary investments by local governments, in relation to extending the expiration of the provisions thereof
